//: Non-secret Android signing map. Resolves <packageFileTitle>.<distribution> to the keystore folder under .user/. The secrets (keystore.p12 + keystore_pass.txt) live in .user/<dir>/ locally, or are materialized there from GitHub secrets by PrepareCiAndroidSigning.ps1. Distribution fan-out (arm64-web shares the web key; all Connect distributions share one key) lives here so secrets are never duplicated. The key alias is auto-detected from the keystore by PublishAndroidApp.ps1, so a fork can use its own keystore without editing this file; add an optional "alias" to an entry only to override (e.g. a multi-entry keystore).
